20: class IssueRelation < ApplicationRecord
21:   # Class used to represent the relations of an issue
22:   class Relations < Array
23:     include Redmine::I18n
24: 
25:     def initialize(issue, *)
26:       @issue = issue
27:       super(*)
28:     end
29: 
30:     def to_s(*args)
31:       map {|relation| relation.to_s(@issue)}.join(', ')
32:     end
33:   end
34: 
35:   include Redmine::SafeAttributes
36:   include Redmine::Utils::DateCalculation
37: 
38:   belongs_to :issue_from, :class_name => 'Issue'
39:   belongs_to :issue_to, :class_name => 'Issue'
40: 
41:   TYPE_RELATES      = "relates"
42:   TYPE_DUPLICATES   = "duplicates"
43:   TYPE_DUPLICATED   = "duplicated"
44:   TYPE_BLOCKS       = "blocks"
45:   TYPE_BLOCKED      = "blocked"
46:   TYPE_PRECEDES     = "precedes"
47:   TYPE_FOLLOWS      = "follows"
48:   TYPE_COPIED_TO    = "copied_to"
49:   TYPE_COPIED_FROM  = "copied_from"
50: 
51:   TYPES = {
52:     TYPE_RELATES =>     {:name => :label_relates_to, :sym_name => :label_relates_to,
53:                          :order => 1, :sym => TYPE_RELATES},
54:     TYPE_DUPLICATES =>  {:name => :label_duplicates, :sym_name => :label_duplicated_by,
55:                          :order => 2, :sym => TYPE_DUPLICATED},
56:     TYPE_DUPLICATED =>  {:name => :label_duplicated_by, :sym_name => :label_duplicates,
57:                          :order => 3, :sym => TYPE_DUPLICATES, :reverse => TYPE_DUPLICATES},
58:     TYPE_BLOCKS =>      {:name => :label_blocks, :sym_name => :label_blocked_by,
59:                          :order => 4, :sym => TYPE_BLOCKED},
60:     TYPE_BLOCKED =>     {:name => :label_blocked_by, :sym_name => :label_blocks,
61:                          :order => 5, :sym => TYPE_BLOCKS, :reverse => TYPE_BLOCKS},
62:     TYPE_PRECEDES =>    {:name => :label_precedes, :sym_name => :label_follows,
63:                          :order => 6, :sym => TYPE_FOLLOWS},
64:     TYPE_FOLLOWS =>     {:name => :label_follows, :sym_name => :label_precedes,
65:                          :order => 7, :sym => TYPE_PRECEDES, :reverse => TYPE_PRECEDES},
66:     TYPE_COPIED_TO =>   {:name => :label_copied_to, :sym_name => :label_copied_from,
67:                          :order => 8, :sym => TYPE_COPIED_FROM},
68:     TYPE_COPIED_FROM => {:name => :label_copied_from, :sym_name => :label_copied_to,
69:                          :order => 9, :sym => TYPE_COPIED_TO, :reverse => TYPE_COPIED_TO}
70:   }.freeze
71: 
72:   validates_presence_of :issue_from, :issue_to, :relation_type
73:   validates_inclusion_of :relation_type, :in => TYPES.keys
74:   validates_numericality_of :delay, :allow_nil => true
75:   validates_uniqueness_of :issue_to_id, :scope => :issue_from_id, :case_sensitive => true
76:   validate :validate_issue_relation
77: 
78:   before_save :handle_issue_order
79:   after_create  :call_issues_relation_added_callback
80:   after_destroy :call_issues_relation_removed_callback
81: 
82:   safe_attributes 'relation_type',
83:                   'delay',
84:                   'issue_to_id'
85: 
86:   def safe_attributes=(attrs, user=User.current)
87:     if attrs.respond_to?(:to_unsafe_hash)
88:       attrs = attrs.to_unsafe_hash
89:     end
90:     return unless attrs.is_a?(Hash)
91: 
92:     attrs = attrs.deep_dup
93:     if issue_id = attrs.delete('issue_to_id')
94:       if issue_id.to_s.strip =~ /\A#?(\d+)\z/
95:         issue_id = $1.to_i
96:         self.issue_to = Issue.visible(user).find_by_id(issue_id)
97:       end
98:     end
99: 
100:     super(attrs)
101:   end
102: 
103:   def visible?(user=User.current)
104:     (issue_from.nil? || issue_from.visible?(user)) && (issue_to.nil? || issue_to.visible?(user))
105:   end
106: 
107:   def deletable?(user=User.current)
108:     visible?(user) &&
109:       ((issue_from.nil? || user.allowed_to?(:manage_issue_relations, issue_from.project)) ||
110:         (issue_to.nil? || user.allowed_to?(:manage_issue_relations, issue_to.project)))
111:   end
112: 
113:   def initialize(attributes=nil, *args)
114:     super
115:     if new_record?
116:       if relation_type.blank?
117:         self.relation_type = IssueRelation::TYPE_RELATES
118:       end
119:     end
120:   end
121: 
122:   def validate_issue_relation
123:     if issue_from && issue_to
124:       errors.add :issue_to_id, :invalid if issue_from_id == issue_to_id
125:       unless issue_from.project_id == issue_to.project_id ||
126:                 Setting.cross_project_issue_relations?
127:         errors.add :issue_to_id, :not_same_project
128:       end
129:       if circular_dependency?
130:         errors.add :base, :circular_dependency
131:       end
132:       if issue_from.is_descendant_of?(issue_to) || issue_from.is_ancestor_of?(issue_to)
133:         errors.add :base, :cant_link_an_issue_with_a_descendant
134:       end
135:     end
136:   end
137: 
138:   def other_issue(issue)
139:     (self.issue_from_id == issue.id) ? issue_to : issue_from
140:   end
141: 
142:   # Returns the relation type for +issue+
143:   def relation_type_for(issue)
144:     if TYPES[relation_type]
145:       if self.issue_from_id == issue.id
146:         relation_type
147:       else
148:         TYPES[relation_type][:sym]
149:       end
150:     end
151:   end
152: 
153:   def label_for(issue)
154:     if TYPES[relation_type]
155:       TYPES[relation_type][(self.issue_from_id == issue.id) ? :name : :sym_name]
156:     else
157:       :unknow
158:     end
159:   end
160: 
161:   def to_s(issue=nil)
162:     issue ||= issue_from
163:     issue_text = block_given? ? yield(other_issue(issue)) : "##{other_issue(issue).try(:id)}"
164:     s = []
165:     s << l(label_for(issue))
166:     s << "(#{l('datetime.distance_in_words.x_days', :count => delay)})" if delay && delay != 0
167:     s << issue_text
168:     s.join(' ')
169:   end
170: 
171:   def css_classes_for(issue)
172:     "rel-#{relation_type_for(issue)}"
173:   end
174: 
175:   def handle_issue_order
176:     reverse_if_needed
177: 
178:     if relation_type == TYPE_PRECEDES
179:       self.delay ||= 0
180:     else
181:       self.delay = nil
182:     end
183:     set_issue_to_dates
184:   end
185: 
186:   def set_issue_to_dates(journal=nil)
187:     soonest_start = self.successor_soonest_start
188:     if soonest_start && issue_to
189:       issue_to.reschedule_on!(soonest_start, journal)
190:     end
191:   end
192: 
193:   def successor_soonest_start
194:     if (self.relation_type == TYPE_PRECEDES) && delay && issue_from &&
195:            (issue_from.start_date || issue_from.due_date)
196:       add_working_days((issue_from.due_date || issue_from.start_date), (1 + delay))
197:     end
198:   end
199: 
200:   def <=>(relation)

20: module Issue::Webhookable
21:   extend ActiveSupport::Concern
22: 
23:   def webhook_payload(user, action)
24:     h = super
25:     if action == 'updated' && current_journal.present?
26:       journal = journals.visible(user).find_by_id(current_journal.id)
27:       if journal.present?
28:         h[:data][:journal] = journal_payload(journal, user)
29:         h[:timestamp] = journal.created_on.iso8601
30:       end
31:     end
32:     h
33:   end
34: 
35:   private
36: 
37:   def journal_payload(journal, user)
38:     {
39:       id: journal.id,
40:       created_on: journal.created_on.iso8601,
41:       notes: journal.notes,
42:       user: {
43:         id: journal.user.id,
44:         name: journal.user.name,
45:       },
46:       details: journal.visible_details(user).map do |d|
47:         {
48:           property: d.property,
49:           prop_key: d.prop_key,
50:           old_value: d.old_value,
51:           value: d.value,
52:         }
53:       end
54:     }
55:   end

20: module Redmine
21:   module Acts
22:     module Webhookable
23:       def self.included(base)
24:         base.extend ClassMethods
25:       end
26: 
27:       module ClassMethods
28:         def acts_as_webhookable(events = %w(created updated deleted))
29:           events = Array(events).map(&:to_s)
30:           WebhookPayload.register_model(self, events)
31: 
32:           events.each do |event|
33:             case event
34:             when 'created'
35:               after_create_commit ->{ Webhook.trigger(event_name('created'), self) }
36:             when 'updated'
37:               after_update_commit ->{ Webhook.trigger(event_name('updated'), self) }
38:             when 'deleted'
39:               after_destroy_commit ->{ Webhook.trigger(event_name('deleted'), self) }
40:             end
41:           end
42: 
43:           include Redmine::Acts::Webhookable::InstanceMethods
44:         end
45:       end
46: 
47:       module InstanceMethods
48:         def event_name(action)
49:           "#{self.class.model_name.singular}.#{action}"
50:         end
51: 
52:         def webhook_payload(user, action)
53:           {
54:             type: event_name(action),
55:             timestamp: webhook_payload_timestamp(action),
56:             data: {
57:               self.class.model_name.singular.to_sym =>
58:                 WebhookPayload::ApiRenderer.new(webhook_payload_api_template, user).to_h(**webhook_payload_ivars)
59:             }
60:           }
61:         end
62: 
63:         def webhook_payload_ivars
64:           { self.class.model_name.singular.to_sym => self }
65:         end
66: 
67:         def webhook_payload_api_template
68:           "app/views/#{self.class.model_name.plural}/show.api.rsb"
69:         end
70: 
71:         def webhook_payload_timestamp(action)
72:           ts = case action
73:                when 'created'
74:                  created_on
75:                when 'updated'
76:                  updated_on
77:                else
78:                  Time.now
79:                end
80: 
81:           ts.iso8601
82:         end
83:       end
84:     end
85:   end

33:       @year = params[:year].to_i
34:       if params[:month] and params[:month].to_i > 0 and params[:month].to_i < 13
35:         @month = params[:month].to_i
36:       end

38:     @year ||= User.current.today.year
